rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee/eq/const in component type annexes for interface behavior; use assign in implementation annexes for binding.
Use only visible port names or explicitly declared constants/variables in AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: Contracts should reflect interface-level invariants, not implementation-specific bindings.
Boolean logic in guarantees should be grounded in named, visible signals or computed relations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE blocks must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use const or eq to introduce named expressions before referencing them in assume/guarantee.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without intermediate bindings.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement decisions for traceability
